title: Notion AI Cheat Sheet
description: Quick guide to using Notion AI for everyday tasks.

commands.description: Provides a concise summary of the given text.
commands.scenario: When you need a quick overview of a long article.

commands.description: Creates a to-do list based on your input.
commands.scenario: When planning tasks for a project or day.

commands.description: Simplifies complex text for better understanding.
commands.scenario: When a document is too technical or formal.

commands.command: Brainstorm ideas for a blog post
commands.description: Generates creative ideas for blog content.
commands.scenario: When you're stuck on what to write about.

commands.description: Translates the provided text into Spanish.
Drafts an agenda for an upcoming meeting.
commands.scenario: When preparing for a structured meeting.

commands.description: Condenses information into three key points.
commands.scenario: When you need to present main ideas quickly.

commands.description: Provides a simple explanation of a complex concept.
commands.scenario: When you need to understand a difficult topic.

commands.description: Creates a draft reply based on the email context.
commands.scenario: When you need to quickly respond to an email.

commands.description: Generates a list of advantages and disadvantages.
commands.scenario: When evaluating a decision or option.

commands.description: Outlines a timeline for project tasks.
commands.scenario: When organizing project milestones and deadlines.

commands.description: Produces a short creative story from a prompt.
commands.scenario: When you want to entertain or practice creative writing.

commands.command: Convert this list to a table
commands.description: Transforms a list into a structured table format.
commands.scenario: When you need to organize information neatly.

commands.description: Suggests related topics based on the current content.
commands.scenario: When expanding research or content ideas.

commands.description: Adjust the emotional delivery of your existing text to suit a specific audience without changing the core meaning.
Scan long meeting notes or messy transcripts to pull out specific tasks and identify who is responsible for them.

commands.command: Create a FAQ section based on this content
commands.description: Automatically generate a list of frequently asked questions and answers derived from the provided text.
Ask the AI to act as a devil's advocate to find logical gaps, weaknesses, or missing perspectives in your text.
Convert unformatted text or raw data into clean Markdown syntax with headers, bolding, and lists.
